title: Gerçek Cinler 2
overview: Özge and Nisa come to Istanbul from Izmir to work in a media company. The director at the media company they started to work with is famous for horror movies and after an e-mail, he meets a person named Cafer. Cafer says he has real genie images. He even sends a medallion to the media company to prove that the images in the hard drive are real. Whoever wears this locket is haunted by the Jinn. Unaware of this, Özge and Nisa open the cargo from Cafer and accidentally wear the medallion while watching the footage. Since they do not have a place to stay yet, Özge and Nisa stay at the media company at night after everyone working in the company leaves. But they are no longer alone. Since they put on the medallion, the Jinn have already arrived at their place of residence.
